MODULE: cosmos.compatibility.device_node
FILE: cosmos/compatibility/device_node.py (700 lines)
CATEGORY: compatibility

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Device Node - HermesAgent Node Compatibility
=====================================================

Provides device-level capabilities matching HermesAgent's node system:
- Camera (snap, clip)
- Screen recording
- Location services
- System notifications
- Command execution

Platform Support:

CLASSES:
- NodeCapability(Enum): Device node capabilities.
- NodeResult: Result from a device node operation.
- DeviceNode: Device node for HermesAgent compatibility.

Exposes camera, screen, location, an
  Methods: def has_capability(self, cap: NodeCapability) -> bool
  Methods: async def camera_snap(self, facing: str='back') -> NodeResult
  Methods: async def camera_clip(self, duration: int=10, fps: int=30, audio: bool=False) -> NodeResult
  Methods: async def screen_snap(self, screen_idx: int=0) -> NodeResult
  Methods: async def screen_record(self, duration: int=10, fps: int=30, audio: bool=False, screen_idx: int=0) -
  Methods: async def get_location(self, accuracy: str='best', max_age: int=15000, timeout: int=10000) -> NodeRe
  Methods: async def notify(self, title: str, body: str, priority: str='active', delivery: str='system') -> Nod
  Methods: async def run(self, command: str, cwd: str=None, env: Dict[str, str]=None, timeout: int=30, needs_sc

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_device_node() -> DeviceNode
- async def camera_snap(facing: str='back') -> NodeResult
- async def camera_clip(duration: int=10) -> NodeResult
- async def screen_record(duration: int=10, fps: int=30) -> NodeResult
- async def get_location() -> NodeResult
- async def send_notification(title: str, body: str) -> NodeResult
